sqlMap.select: SELECT B.GUBUN, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.TITLE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM AS A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO AS B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BOARDID = ( SELECT CONNECTION_URL FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PORTLET_ID = #portletId# ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #companyId# ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE ASC LIMIT #limit#
SELECT ITEMSEQ, POLLTITLE, ANSWER1, ANSWER2, ANSWER3, ANSWER4, ANSWER5, ANSWER6, ANSWER7, ANSWER8, ANSWER9, ANSWER10 FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM tbl_vote_question A JOIN tbl_vote_user_and_question B ON A.ID = B.QST_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.END_DATE > date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND ( ( B.USER_ID = #userId# AND B.user_type = 'user' ) OR ( B.USER_type = 'company' AND B.USER_ID = #companyId# ) OR ( B.user_type = 'dept' AND B.USER_ID IN ( SELECT C.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER C WHERE (FIND_IN_SET (CN, #deptPath#) OR CN = 'Top') AND C.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) ) ) AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT A.ID, A.TITLE FROM tbl_vote_question A JOIN tbl_vote_user_and_question B ON A.ID = B.QST_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.END_DATE > date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND ( ( B.USER_ID = #userId# AND B.user_type = 'user' ) OR ( B.USER_type = 'company' AND B.USER_ID = #companyId# ) OR ( B.user_type = 'dept' AND B.USER_ID IN ( SELECT C.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER C WHERE (FIND_IN_SET (CN, #deptPath#) OR CN = 'Top') AND C.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) ) ) AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT QST_ID, VOTES_NUM, CONTENT FROM TBL_VOTE_ANSWER WHERE QST_ID = #qstId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.TITLE, B.FILEPATH FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.BOARDID = #boardId# AND B.MAIN_FLAG = 'y' ORDER BY A.WRITEDATE DESC LIMIT #startRow#, #photoCount#
SELECT READ_FG FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE BOARDID = #boardId# AND ACCESSID = #accessId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId#

SELECT A.PORTLET_ID, A.PORTLET_ORDER, B.PORTLET_NAME, C.PORTLET_URL FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME B ON A.PORTLET_ID = B.PORTLET_ID AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND B.PORTLET_LANG = #portletLang# JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET C ON A.PORTLET_ID = C.PORTLET_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# ORDER BY A.PORTLET_ORDER

SELECT A.PORTLET_ID, A.PORTLET_ORDER, B.PORTLET_NAME, C.PORTLET_URL FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME B ON A.PORTLET_ID = B.PORTLET_ID AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND B.PORTLET_LANG = #portletLang# JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET C ON A.PORTLET_ID = C.PORTLET_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# ORDER BY A.PORTLET_ORDER

SELECT A.PORTLET_ID, B.PORTLET_ORDER, C.PORTLET_NAME, A.PORTLET_URL, IF(A.PORTLET_TYPE = 'G', 1, 0) AS IS_GENERAL, A.DEFAULT_ORDER, B.PORTLET_CATEGORY, B.CONNECTION_URL, IF(B.PORTLET_USED = 'Y', 1, 0) AS PORTLET_USED FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP B ON A.PORTLET_ID = B.PORTLET_ID AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME C ON B.PORTLET_ID = C.PORTLET_ID AND B.MENU_ID = C.MENU_ID AND C.PORTLET_LANG = #portletLang# WHERE B.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PORTLET_ID = #portletId#;

SELECT TBL_FORMINFO.* FROM TBL_FORMINFO INNER JOIN TBL_FORMUSERINFO ON TBL_FORMINFO.tenant_id = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_FORMINFO.companyid = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.companyid AND TBL_FORMINFO.formid = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.formid WHERE TBL_FORMUSERINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_FORMUSERINFO.companyid = #companyId# AND TBL_FORMUSERINFO.userid = #userId# ORDER BY FORMORDER LIMIT 0, 5
SELECT USER_ID, USED_THEME, USED_FRAME FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT #userId# AS USER_ID, THEME_ID AS USED_THEME, (SELECT FRAME_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FRAME_DEFAULT = 'Y' AND THEME_ID = (SELECT THEME_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND THEME_DEFAULT = 'Y')) AS USED_FRAME FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND THEME_DEFAULT = 'Y' LIMIT 1;
